title: Box Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub Box (AreaNumber As Integer, MinX as Single, MaxX as Single, MinY as Single, MaxY as Single, MinZ As Single, MaxZ as Single)
parameters:
AreaNumber	The servo axis number. This can be 1, 2, 3 or 4, corresponding to the T1, T2, Z or U axis.

MinX	The servo axis number. This can be 1, 2, 3 or 4, corresponding to the T1, T2, Z or U axis.

MaxX	The servo axis number. This can be 1, 2, 3 or 4, corresponding to the T1, T2, Z or U axis.

MinY	The servo axis number. This can be 1, 2, 3 or 4, corresponding to the T1, T2, Z or U axis.

MaxY	The servo axis number. This can be 1, 2, 3 or 4, corresponding to the T1, T2, Z or U axis.

MinZ	The servo axis number. This can be 1, 2, 3 or 4, corresponding to the T1, T2, Z or U axis.

MaxZ	The servo axis number. This can be 1, 2, 3 or 4, corresponding to the T1, T2, Z or U axis.
see_also:
BoxClr

BoxDef

Plane

Box Example

VB Example:

m_spel.Box(1, -5, 5, -10, 10, -20, 20)

C# Example:

m_spel.Box(1, -5, 5, -10, 10, -20, 20);
